allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('content/articles.json'\)\); print\('valid JSON,', len\(d\), 'articles:', [a['slug'] for a in d]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('content/articles.json'\)\); print\('valid,', len\(d\), 'articles'\); print\('sample blocks of last:', [b['type'] for b in d[-1]['blocks'][:8]]\)")
